home.headline: Agricultural intelligence, {{br}} designed for output.
home.subheadline: Deploy deep-learning diagnostic models, consult with AI agronomists, and access state subsidies through a unified, high-contrast dashboard.

diagnose.title: Diagnostic {{br}}Pathology Engine
diagnose.desc: Upload raw imagery of symptomatic foliage. Our computer vision models align pathology with 50,000+ verifiable agricultural vectors.

advisory.desc: 18mm accumulation expected. Recommendation: Delay NPK fertilizer broadcasting by 48 hours to mitigate runoff risk.

schemes.title: State Frameworks
